blurb: The gift of faith is not a ticket to escape life but a reservoir hidden in the soul, releasing patience, self-control, and fearless love. These verses promise that whoever welcomes the divine teacher within will find the heart itself widened, its rough places smoothed, and every virtue written there as naturally as fruit on a well-rooted tree. Read them slowly and let the quiet assurance take root: the seed God plants neither panics nor gives up; it grows into a character that outlives every storm.

verses.text: This faith if thou also desirest, apprehend first full knowledge of the Father.

For God loved men for whose sake He made the world, to whom He subjected all things that are in the earth, to whom He gave reason and mind, whom alone He permitted to look up to heaven, whom He created after His own image, to whom He sent His only begotten Son, to whom He promised the kingdom which is in heaven, and will give it to those that have loved Him.
